ERP Platform for Bicycle Part Manufacturing Company

Background Information

Adventure Works Cycles is a fictitious, large-scale, multinational manufacturing company created by Microsoft. It produces and distributes metal and composite bicycles, along with related parts and accessories, to commercial markets across North America, Europe, and Asia. it contains information from 2010-2013. It is provided by Microsoft to train SQL skills and understanding of relational databases so the numbers are not realistic.
It's ERP functions across five core departments: Human Resources, Sales, Production, Purchasing, and People.

Finance Agent

Special agent designed to handle complex queries about the company by accessing a SQL database stored in Microsoft Dataverse. Utilizes a MCP server, Power Automate Flows, and custom prompting tools to generate responses to queries regarding the dataset, financial analysis of the company, and automated generation of Word Document Reports.
